summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-FAV-001: favicon link tag present in HTML with href='/favicon.png', HTTP 200 on fetch. VAL-ICON-001: token icons appear only on label rows (token-label-icon class, inside token-field-label), zero icons inside input wrappers (token-input-icon count=0, all token-input-wrapper imgCount=0).
